heading: Exercise of rulemaking powers
label: 1431 Exercise of rulemaking powers

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective upon expiration of the 180-day period beginning on , with provisions for effect on pending proceedings, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 115–397section 401 of Pub. L. 115–397section 1301 of this titleDec. 21, 2018

children.text: as an exercise of the rulemaking power of the House of Representatives and the Senate, respectively, and as such they shall be considered as part of the rules of such House, respectively, and such rules shall supersede other rules only to the extent that they are inconsistent therewith; and

with full recognition of the constitutional right of either House to change such rules (so far as relating to such House) at any time, in the same manner, and to the same extent as in the case of any other rule of each House.
